allow: Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const init = require\('./db/init'\); init\(\).then\(\(\) => { console.log\('OK'\); process.exit\(0\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\)")
